name: browser-mcp-nextgen
description: BrowserMCP NextGen — autonomous AI browser employee (MCP server + Chrome extension)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @browser-mcp/shared && npm run build -w @browser-mcp/server && npm run build -w @browser-mcp/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @browser-mcp/shared && npm run typecheck -w @browser-mcp/server && npm run typecheck -w @browser-mcp/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @browser-mcp/shared && npm run test -w @browser-mcp/server

author: BrowserMCP-NextGen
